Your operations, handled with precision and care

I've spent my career embedded in the operations of growing businesses, learning how great leaders think, what slows them down, and how to remove every obstacle before it appears. I bring a rare combination of strategic thinking and meticulous execution to every engagement.

How It Works

From first call to fully supported

01

Discovery Call

02

Custom Setup

03

Seamless Support

I become the steady hand behind your operation, proactively managing, anticipating needs, and protecting your time and energy every single week.

Executive Assistant Services

Everything You Need to
Lead at Your Best

Every service I offer is designed around a single goal, removing the operational weight so you can focus entirely on what moves your business forward.

My Approach

Not just tasks, strategic support

I don't operate like a task-taker. I think ahead, anticipate needs, and build systems that make your entire operation run smoother, whether you need part-time support or a full operational partner.

Most Popular
01

Calendar & Schedule Management

Your calendar is your most powerful business asset. I design and manage a calendar system that reflects your actual priorities, protects your focus time, and ensures you are always prepared and never double-booked.

  • Organise and manage daily, weekly, and monthly calendars
  • Schedule and confirm meetings, calls, and events
  • Prioritise appointments and manage conflicts
  • Cross-timezone scheduling with precision
  • Send reminders and follow-ups to ensure punctuality
02

Communication & Email Management

I manage your inbox to zero every day, responding, triaging, and drafting communications in your voice so nothing important is ever missed, delayed, or left unanswered.

  • Screen, prioritise, and respond to emails on your behalf
  • Draft professional correspondence, letters, memos, and emails
  • Handle phone calls, messages, and inquiries
  • Maintain clear communication with teams, clients, and partners
  • Stakeholder communication tracking and follow-up systems
03

Travel & Logistics

From local meetings to international conferences and multi-city tours, I handle every detail of your travel so you arrive calm, fully briefed, and ready to perform.

  • Research, book, and coordinate flights, hotels, and transportation
  • Prepare detailed travel itineraries and manage last-minute changes
  • Arrange visa applications and travel documentation
  • Comprehensive trip briefing documents for every journey
  • Real-time support and contingency planning during travel
04

Project & Task Management

I keep your projects on track and your team aligned, coordinating moving parts across internal teams and external partners so deadlines are always met and nothing falls through.

  • Track deadlines, milestones, and deliverables
  • Coordinate with internal teams and external partners
  • Prepare progress reports and status updates
  • Manage project timelines and flag risks early
  • Keep all stakeholders informed and accountable
05

Financial & Administrative Support

I take the admin out of your finances, keeping your expenses organised, invoices tracked, and recurring payments managed so your bookkeeper is always happy and you are never caught off guard.

  • Manage expense reports and reimbursements
  • Handle invoicing, billing, and budgeting tasks
  • Track subscriptions, memberships, and recurring payments
  • Receipt organisation and financial file management
  • Liaison with accountants and bookkeepers
06

Meeting Preparation & Follow-Up

Every meeting you walk into, you walk in prepared. Every meeting you leave, every action item is captured and followed through. I handle both ends so nothing is ever lost or forgotten.

  • Prepare agendas, presentations, and briefing notes
  • Ensure all materials are ready and distributed ahead of time
  • Take detailed meeting minutes and action item logs
  • Follow up with attendees on outstanding action items
  • Post-meeting summaries and decision documentation
07

Research & Reporting

Whether you need market intelligence, competitor analysis, or a briefing document before an important meeting, I deliver thorough, clear, and actionable research that saves you hours.

  • Conduct research on industry trends and opportunities
  • Competitor analysis and market summaries
  • Compile data and present findings in clean reports
  • Prepare talking points and briefing materials for meetings
  • Supplier, vendor, and partner vetting research
08

Document & File Management

A well-organised filing system is the foundation of a well-run business. I create, maintain, and protect your documents, both digital and physical, so everything is findable in seconds.

  • Organise and maintain digital and physical files
  • Draft contracts, agreements, and proposals as needed
  • Create polished presentations and formatted reports
  • Proofread and edit documents for accuracy and tone
  • Ensure confidential documents are stored securely
09

Client Relationship Management

Your relationships are your most valuable business asset. I help you nurture and maintain them with consistent, thoughtful, and professional touchpoints that keep clients, partners, and stakeholders engaged.

  • Manage client and partner follow-ups and relationship touchpoints
  • Coordinate gifts, thank-you notes, and acknowledgments
  • Plan and execute professional or social events
  • Maintain CRM databases and contact records
  • Track key relationship milestones and anniversaries
10

Technology & Tools Support

I am proficient across the tools that modern executives rely on and can set up, manage, and optimise your digital workspace so your tech works for you, not against you.

  • Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Slack, Notion, and more
  • Set up and manage collaborative platforms and project tools
  • Troubleshoot minor tech and platform issues
  • Onboard team members to new tools and workflows
  • Automate repetitive tasks to save time across your operation
11

Personal Assistance

When life and work blur together, I step in. From personal appointments to lifestyle coordination, I handle the personal layer of your life with the same discretion and care I bring to your business.

  • Manage personal appointments, errands, and reminders
  • Coordinate household or lifestyle management tasks
  • Gift research, purchasing, and delivery coordination
  • Personal event planning and RSVP management
  • Any personal task agreed on a case-by-case basis
12

Shopify Store Management

From product listings to order management, I keep your Shopify store running smoothly and professionally so you can focus on growing the business, not administering it.

  • Product uploads, descriptions, and tagging
  • Order tracking and fulfilment coordination
  • Inventory monitoring and low-stock alerts
  • Customer enquiry management and response
  • Basic store updates, content edits, and seasonal changes
13

Onboarding & HR Support

Smooth, professional onboarding experiences for new team members, handled with care and precision so your people feel valued and set up for success from their very first day.

  • New hire onboarding coordination and scheduling
  • Offer letter and contract preparation
  • Onboarding document packs and welcome materials
  • Tool access setup and account creation
  • First-week schedule and onboarding checklist management
14

Strategic & Ad-Hoc Support

The work that does not fit neatly into a category but matters enormously. I anticipate your needs, step in before problems arise, and handle whatever the day throws at you, urgently and with care.

  • Assist with business strategy planning and workflow optimisation
  • Anticipate client needs and proactively solve problems
  • Handle urgent or time-sensitive tasks as they arise
  • Ad-hoc research, writing, or coordination projects
  • Anything that keeps you from operating at your best
Not sure where to start?

Book a free 30-minute consultation and I'll tell you exactly what would make the biggest difference for you right now.

Operations & Calendar · Tea & Hospitality Brand

Bringing Order to a Growing Brooklyn Brand

The Founder & CEO, Brooklyn Tea, Brooklyn NY

Brooklyn Tea had grown rapidly from a neighbourhood tea shop into a multi-channel brand with events, wholesale, and a busy retail presence. The founder was managing customer communications, vendor relationships, event logistics, and team scheduling simultaneously, with no system holding it together. Things were slipping, and the energy needed for growth was being consumed by daily operations.

The Challenge

No centralised operations system. Customer and vendor emails going unanswered for days. Events being planned reactively. The founder spending 70% of their time on admin rather than brand strategy.

What I Did

Built a full operations framework in Notion, took over all vendor and customer correspondence, created event planning templates and timelines, and established a weekly rhythm of briefings that kept the founder informed without being pulled into every detail.

15h
Saved weekly
3×
Faster responses
100%
Events on time
Operations Dashboard, Brooklyn Tea
Vendor emails managed48 / week
Events coordinated12 in 3 months
Response timeUnder 4 hours
Founder admin time−70% reduction
Admin load before70%
Admin load after21%
"Before she came on board I was drowning. Now our whole operation runs like clockwork and I can actually focus on growing the brand."
, Founder, Brooklyn Tea
Executive Support · Creative & Design Studio

Rescuing a Creative Director's Calendar

Creative Director, Elevate Studios, New York

A creative director at a growing design studio was spending her most valuable hours in back-to-back meetings, responding to client emails, and chasing internal deadlines. Her creative output, the core reason clients hired the studio, was suffering. She needed an Executive Assistant who could take complete ownership of her schedule and communications without needing constant guidance.

The Challenge

Calendar with zero protected creative time. 200+ unread emails. Client follow-ups being missed. No briefing system before important meetings. Three missed deadlines in two months.

What I Did

Audited and restructured the entire calendar, cutting 8 recurring meetings, establishing 3 protected creative blocks weekly, and implementing a morning briefing document delivered every day by 8am. Took over inbox management completely.

12h
Creative time gained
8
Meetings eliminated
0
Missed deadlines
Weekly Schedule, Before & After
Deep creative work+12h added
Unnecessary meetings−8 removed
Email managementFully delegated
Daily briefing doc8am every morning
Creative time before20%
Creative time after68%
"She understood exactly what I needed without me having to explain it twice. My work improved immediately because I finally had space to think."
, Creative Director, Elevate Studios
Event Coordination · Professional Services Firm

End-to-End Corporate Event Series

Managing Director, Summit Advisory, New York

A professional services firm needed to host a series of four client appreciation events across New York over a single quarter. The Managing Director wanted seamless, memorable experiences for their most important clients, but had no capacity to manage the logistics alongside running the business. With a firm budget and high expectations, every detail mattered.

The Challenge

Four events in 12 weeks, across different venues, with 40–80 guests each. Catering, AV, invitations, RSVP management, and post-event follow-up all needed coordinating simultaneously.

What I Did

Sourced and negotiated all venues and vendors, managed the full guest list and RSVPs, created run-of-show documents for each event, coordinated on-the-day logistics, and handled all post-event thank you communications and feedback collection.

4
Events delivered
260+
Guests managed
12%
Under budget

Event 2, Rooftop ReceptionDelivered ✓

"Every single event was flawless. Our clients were impressed and our team didn't have to lift a finger. The level of organisation was extraordinary."
, Managing Director, Summit Advisory

About Me

An Executive Assistant who thinks like your business partner

I've built my career around one core belief, that behind every effective leader is an even more effective support system. I specialise in creating the operational clarity that lets executives, founders, and business owners do what they are best at, without the weight of everything else.

I bring a rare combination of warmth, strategic thinking, and relentless attention to detail to every engagement I take on. I don't just complete tasks, I anticipate them. I don't just follow instructions, I understand the bigger picture and make decisions accordingly.

My experience spans operations management, executive communications, travel coordination, and project management across industries including hospitality, creative services, and professional services. I am trusted by the people I work with because I treat their business with the same care I would give my own.

I take on a limited number of clients so that every person I work with receives my complete focus and best work, always.

Executive Calendar Architecture
Inbox Zero Systems
Global Travel Logistics
Event Planning & Coordination
Operations & Process Design
Stakeholder Communications
Vendor & Supplier Management

Legal

Privacy Policy

Your privacy matters. This policy explains clearly how your data is collected, used, and protected.

Last updated: March 2025

This Privacy Policy describes how InSyncEA ("I", "me", "my") collects, uses, and protects personal information submitted through this website (insync-ea.com). I am committed to protecting your privacy and handling your data in an open and transparent manner, in accordance with applicable data protection laws including the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) where applicable.

1. Information I Collect

I collect personal information that you voluntarily provide when you:

  • Complete the contact form on this website
  • Send me an email directly
  • Engage with me through social media or other channels

The information collected may include your name, email address, company name, job title, and any details you share in your message. I do not collect sensitive personal data.

2. How I Use Your Information

I use your personal information solely for the following purposes:

  • To respond to your enquiry and communicate with you about potential or existing services
  • To provide and manage the executive assistant services you have engaged me for
  • To send relevant information you have requested
  • To comply with any legal obligations

I will never sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes.

3. Legal Basis for Processing (GDPR)

Where GDPR applies, I process your personal data on the following legal bases: your consent (when you submit the contact form), the performance of a contract (when providing services), and compliance with legal obligations.

4. Data Retention

I retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes for which it was collected. Contact enquiries are retained for up to 12 months unless an ongoing service relationship exists. Client data is retained for the duration of our engagement and for a reasonable period thereafter as required by law or legitimate business purposes.

5. Cookies & Analytics

This website may use essential cookies to ensure basic functionality. If analytics tools are used, they collect anonymised data about how visitors use the site (pages visited, time spent, device type). No personally identifiable information is collected through cookies. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences.

6. Data Security

I take reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorised access, loss, or disclosure. All client engagements are covered by a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) before work begins. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure, and I cannot guarantee absolute security.

7. Third-Party Services

This website is hosted on Netlify. Their privacy policy governs how they handle data related to website hosting. I do not use third-party advertising networks or data brokers.

8. Your Rights

Under applicable data protection law, you have the right to:

  • Access the personal information I hold about you
  • Request correction of inaccurate personal data
  • Request deletion of your personal data
  • Object to or restrict processing of your data
  • Withdraw consent at any time (where processing is based on consent)
  • Lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority

To exercise any of these rights, please contact me at hello@insync-ea.com. I will respond within 30 days.

9. Children's Privacy

This website is not directed at children under the age of 13. I do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided personal information through this site, please contact me immediately.

10. Changes to This Policy

I may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. I encourage you to review this policy periodically. Continued use of this website after changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.

11. Contact

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how I handle your personal information, please contact me:

  • Email: hello@insync-ea.com
  • Location: Brooklyn, New York
